title: Collectible Hearts
description: Adds 4 new structures with collectible hearts that increase your max health. Inspired by Life Crystals from Terraria.
body:
# Overview

A datapack that sets your max HP to 4 hearts and adds 4 new underground structures containing hearts. These hearts can be collected by breaking them increasing your max HP by 1 heart. See gallery for images.

# Hard Mode
Hard mode can be toggled by typing /function collectible_hearts:toggle_hard_mode
Hard mode will make you lose 1 heart every time you die.
